title: Amethyst Frames
description: A resource pack that makes item frames fit Hex Casting more
body:
Spruces up item frames with a new model and an amethyst and slate palette!
![A screenshot of an item frame in an item frame with the pack applied](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e84096d0020e60176f7a97b30a3c6c4aa62318.png)
